name: High School DxD RPG
description:
Update: 5/10/26

Added Volume 4 to Scenario book. (Apologies for taking so long.)

This is an RPG bot for High School DxD. Join Rias and her peerage and explore what Kuoh has to offer together. Or don't. Create your own scenario instead if you want.

With the lorebook, I highly recommend using a proxy. I cannot guarantee results with the default JLLM.

If you have any questions or comments, don't hesitate to ask them.

Enjoy.
creator: DaPhunOne
